scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check script.js && node --check functions/api/[[path]].js
scripts.hash-id: node -e "const crypto=require('crypto'); const id=process.argv[1]; if(!id) throw new Error('Usage: npm run hash-id -- <ACCESS_ID>'); console.log(crypto.createHash('sha256').update(id).digest('hex'))"
